rationale: The Administrator user created two scheduled tasks (A0, EV-001) using schtasks.exe. The first task (A0) attempts to execute a file from an alternate data stream (ADS) within C:\Users\Public, which is highly suspicious. The second task (EV-001) attempts to execute a JavaScript file from C:\Users\Public, a common location for malware staging. Both tasks are persistent mechanisms and indicate malicious intent.
